author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 33: 2 Tier-3 net/sched docs (foundational APIs). net/sched/sch-api.md (qdisc framework: register_qdisc/Qdisc_ops registry, qdisc_create/destroy/graft/change, RTM_NEWQDISC/DELQDISC/GETQDISC + RTM_*TCLASS wire w/ TCA_KIND/OPTIONS/STATS/RATE/CHAIN/HW_OFFLOAD/INGRESS_BLOCK/EGRESS_BLOCK NLAs, multi-part dump, qdisc_create_dflt + net.core.default_qdisc, gen_estimator EWMA rate-estimator, tcf_block shared-block IDR, HW offload bridge — 13 REQ / 10 AC, 0 open) + net/sched/cls-api.md (classifier framework: tcf_register_proto registry, struct tcf_block + tcf_chain + tcf_proto, tcf_classify hot path w/ per-priority walk + full TC_ACT_* dispatch + GOTO_CHAIN cycle bound MAX_RECLASSIFY_LOOP, RTM_*TFILTER + RTM_*CHAIN wire, RCU-side classify w/ replace-atomicity guarantee, HW offload via tcf_block_offload_*; OWNS mandatory models/net/cls_chain_eval.tla — 13 REQ / 10 AC, 0 open). 9 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: 105 .design docs. Next: net/sched/act-api.md (action framework — RTM_*TACT shared infrastructure) + net/sched/sch-fq-codel.md (default qdisc, owns models/net/sch_fq_codel.tla).
